/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -g -shared -Wl,-soname,libTSPSolver.so -o /home/louis/projects/TSP-Solver/lib/libTSPSolver.so CMakeFiles/TSPSolver.dir/src/interface.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TSPSolver.dir/src/Context.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TSPSolver.dir/src/ComputeTSP.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TSPSolver.dir/src/Timer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TSPSolver.dir/src/TSPSolverFactory.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TSPSolver.dir/src/GraphUtil.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TSPSolver.dir/src/solvers/TSPSolver.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TSPSolver.dir/src/solvers/IterativeSolver.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TSPSolver.dir/src/solvers/NearestNeighbourSolver.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TSPSolver.dir/src/solvers/AntColonySolver.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TSPSolver.dir/src/solvers/ChristofidesSolver.cpp.o
